title: Bloomy Settings Import
description: A mod that allows you to import and export your options.txt file! Allowing to keep your settings and keybinds between instances.
body:
# Introduction
Are you sick of needing to reset your settings everytime you make a new instance of minecraft? Bloomy Settings Import offers the solution! 
## What is Bloomy Settings Import
Bloomy Settings Import is a mod originally made for the [Bloomy Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bloomy-modpack), but is also perfectly usable as a standalone mod! 
The mod adds a button in your settings where you can import and export your options.txt file. This little file has the information about what your keybinds are, your graphics settings, your mouse sensitivity, your sound settings, etc.

![A cropped screenshot of the minecraft Options Page, now including a new button in the top right corner, named: Settings Import/ Export](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aba021f91e412a3cfe75dea8ffb821c7d680b75a.png)

## How does it work
By copying your file paths you can easily make a directory where you want store your options.txt file, without ever leaving the game! In the same way, by copying a file path from anywhere on your computer you can easily import an options.txt file, restoring the settings you had previously configured.

![A screenshot of a minecraft menu, with a big white gray box, on this box there are some buttons, sliders and textboxes. The buttons have little icons of minecraft items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9909ed807258ec0a229627c64c54c8935a819e09.png)
